caveats: Public showcase only. No real patient data, secure AHS data, private Snowflake data, or private AHS endpoints are used.
Internal ED operating state, model outputs, scenario effects, and unit-level operating values are synthetic demonstration values.
Public facts are used only where cited. Unit-level values without public evidence are labelled synthetic planning assumptions.

public_drivers.direction: higher increases arrivals and respiratory cohort demand
school weeks increase infectious and injury timing
smoke and cold shift respiratory and asthma load
access friction clusters arrivals and transfer delays
holidays and events change time-of-day arrival shape

synthetic_internal_drivers.direction: front-door backlog raises wait and LWBS risk
higher acuity consumes room, physician, diagnostic, and critical-care resources
ties up rooms and shifts bottleneck upstream

confidence.wait_forecast: medium; sensitive to current queues and staffing
confidence.boarding_forecast: medium-low; needs real ADT and bed-board validation

what_would_improve_confidence: real-time ED location and queue timestamps
holdout replay by season and facility
